seoTitle: Wolumla vs Wombarra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wolumla and Wombarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wolumla and Wombarra.
heading: Wolumla vs Wombarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wolumla, New South Wales and Wombarra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wolumla has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Wombarra (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wolumla or Wombarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wolumla has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Wombarra scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wolumla scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Wombarra scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wolumla or Wombarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wolumla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
